arabic_text:
ایک دور
ستۃ صورات
قائم دور
برزخ عاشر
قائم
english_text:
One Cycle (Daur)
Six Forms (Sittah Surat)
Qa'im of the Cycle
Tenth Barzakh
Qa'im
400,000
alt_text: Honeycomb-style composite. Six yellow hexagons numbered 1-6 each labeled 'قائم 50,000 / 7000' representing the six Qa'ims of one Cycle. To the right is a larger hexagon labeled '7 قائم دور 50,000 / 7000 / 400,000' marking the completion of one Cycle of 400,000 years. The formula '(57000 × 6) + 342,000 +' connects them. A miniature inset in the top-left shows the original 50,000-year diagram (image 010 motif). Right margin: 'ستۃ صورات' (Six Forms). Left margin: 'ایک دور' (One Cycle). Bottom-right: 'برزخ عاشر' (Tenth Barzakh).
notes: Pairs with images 015 and 020. Visual culmination of the 400,000-year Daur built from six 50,000-year Qa'im-cycles plus a seventh 'Cycle-Qa'im' position. The Tenth Barzakh marker situates this within the larger eschatological scheme.
